task:
Refactor gid-rs code_graph module to fix 5 interconnected design problems identified in the architecture audit:

1. **Call site position data** — tree-sitter extraction currently discards `node.start_position()` data, forcing text-based fallback searches in LSP phase (~9.7% failure rate). Fix: capture line/col in CallSite struct during tree-sitter extraction.

2. **Unused LSP methods** — `get_references()` and `get_implementations()` are implemented but never called. Fix: wire them into the LSP refinement phase for public symbols and trait methods.

3. **Missing visibility info in CodeNode** — no access-level field, preventing smart filtering of which nodes warrant expensive LSP queries. Fix: add visibility field to CodeNode, populate during tree-sitter extraction.

4. **No trait vs concrete method distinction** — CodeNode doesn't distinguish trait method declarations from concrete implementations. Fix: add node kind/type field to differentiate.

5. **Bloated function signatures** — extraction functions take ~12 parameters instead of a context struct. Fix: introduce ExtractionContext struct.

The unified design principle: tree-sitter handles fast offline extraction (structure, call sites with positions, visibility, confidence), LSP handles expensive precision tasks (definition verification, references for public symbols, implementations for traits) in a single three-phase session.

Project path: /Users/potato/clawd/projects/gid-rs/
Main crate: crates/gid-core/
Relevant files: src/code_graph/types.rs, src/code_graph/build.rs, src/code_graph/languages/*.rs

tasks: Core LLM abstraction and agent loop (llm.rs, agent.rs, events.rs)
Configuration and authentication system (config.rs, auth_profiles.rs, oauth.rs)
Tool registry and built-in tools (tools.rs, sandbox.rs)
Session management and persistence (session.rs with SQLite)
Channel adapters (telegram, discord, slack, signal, whatsapp, matrix)
GID LSP client integration (lsp_client.rs in gid-core)
Workspace and reload systems (workspace.rs, reload.rs, cron.rs)
